title: Sales were up at Tesla but so were costs and spending
summary: Tesla posted its financial statement for the second quarter of the year this afternoon. Tesla’s operating expenses went up 47 percent to $4.4 billion, and income from those operations fell by 57 percent year over year to $398 million.
